gap.counter_hook: Responsive service — we answer and call back, every time.
evidence: The worst company I have ever dealt with - period. No communication, incompetent staff, disinterested supervisors. Called on Saturday because I was in need of a company with 4.9 stars I thought they would be good. They were the opposite. Be

Their service is serious HORRIBLE that they always different excuses delay again and again.   Hard to trust them!!!

08/14/2025 They told my husband that they will change the parts on this Friday, but they told my husband will be next week

Have had repairs done over the last month. Two different parts and almost 2000 in repairs and today no air again. Someone was suppose to call me to let me know when it will be repaired and no one even calls you. Very disappointing.

suggested_action: Review Counter-Positioning: 'Quality Air Conditioning Company' is repeatedly criticized for unresponsive (3 negative reviews). Surface the counter-signal on the client's pages + FAQs: "Responsive service — we answer and call back, every time."
